metadata.title: Product Experiences
metadata.description: Outcome-based product experiences for the Freight Logistics Orchestration domain. Each experience links directly to implementation-facing freight product bricks.

definitions.productBrick: A reusable implementation-facing building block used to realize one or more product experiences.
definitions.productCapability: A high-level, outcome-based experience that delivers customer or business value.

metadata.flowModelNote: Each product experience carries experience-specific flows. Each flow step lists the bricks used inside that experience.

rootGroups.name: Shipper Network Orchestration
rootGroups.description: Capabilities that help shippers plan, procure, tender, govern, and improve transportation networks.

capabilities.name: Plan, Procure, and Govern Freight
capabilities.description: Help shippers model networks, run bid events, govern routing guides, choose modes, and manage transportation policy.

flows.title: Plan and procure a freight network
flows.description: From lane demand through bid award and routing policy.

steps.title: Model lane demand and service policy

dependencies.name: Network Planning Workspace
dependencies.description: Lane, facility, demand, and service policy planning.
dependencies.how: Creates the planning model used to decide where capacity is needed.

dependencies.name: Mode and Service Optimization
dependencies.description: Mode, cost, risk, and service recommendations.
dependencies.how: Compares truckload, LTL, intermodal, dedicated, and expedited options.

steps.title: Run bid events and award lanes

dependencies.name: Contract Procurement and Bid Events
dependencies.description: Bid events, carrier responses, awards, and routing-guide commitments.
dependencies.how: Turns lane strategy into awarded carrier commitments.

dependencies.name: Rate Intelligence and Benchmarking
dependencies.description: Market and historical rate intelligence.
dependencies.how: Provides price confidence and benchmark context for awards.

dependencies.name: Performance Analytics and Scorecards
dependencies.description: Carrier, lane, facility, service, cost, and emissions scorecards.
dependencies.how: Closes the planning loop with performance evidence.

capabilities.name: Operate Shipper Control Tower
capabilities.description: Give shippers and managed transportation teams a single operating layer for shipment creation, tendering, tracking, documents, and support.

flows.title: Create, tender, and monitor shipments
flows.description: From shipper demand intake through tendering and live status.

dependencies.name: Customer Integration Gateway
dependencies.description: EDI, API, file, and webhook integration gateway.
dependencies.how: Pulls order, shipment, master data, and finance signals from customer systems.

dependencies.name: Transportation Management System
dependencies.description: Canonical shipment and load lifecycle.
dependencies.how: Creates and governs the shipment record.

dependencies.name: Tendering and Routing Guide
dependencies.description: Primary, backup, waterfall, and spot fallback tendering.
dependencies.how: Runs the tender sequence and records accept, reject, timeout, and fallback outcomes.

dependencies.name: Shipper Portal and Self-Service
dependencies.description: Shipper-facing shipment, tracking, document, invoice, and support portal.
dependencies.how: Gives transportation teams self-service visibility and action surfaces.

dependencies.name: Real-Time Visibility and ETA
dependencies.description: Milestones, ETA, geofence, and tracking data quality.
dependencies.how: Feeds live status and risk signals into the shipper experience.

rootGroups.name: Capacity Marketplace
rootGroups.description: Capabilities that secure compliant, high-quality freight capacity and make carrier participation more predictable.

capabilities.name: Secure Quality Capacity
capabilities.description: Activate compliant carrier supply, match loads to suitable carriers, and protect service and margin through intelligent offer and pricing workflows.

flows.title: Find, match, and book quality capacity
flows.description: From carrier eligibility through targeted offer and booking.

dependencies.name: Carrier Onboarding and Compliance
dependencies.description: Carrier identity, authority, insurance, safety, equipment, fraud risk, and eligibility.
dependencies.how: Ensures only compliant carriers can access freight.

dependencies.name: Carrier Scorecards and Quality
dependencies.description: Carrier performance, service, claims, tracking, and eligibility history.
dependencies.how: Adds quality and service evidence to capacity decisions.

dependencies.name: Carrier Preferences and Availability
dependencies.description: Carrier lane, equipment, reload, facility, and availability preferences.
dependencies.how: Improves relevance so carriers see freight they are likely to accept.

dependencies.name: Carrier Matching Engine
dependencies.description: Carrier-load ranking using fit, quality, compliance, and economics.
dependencies.how: Selects the best carrier candidates for a load.

dependencies.name: Spot Quoting and Dynamic Pricing
dependencies.description: Spot quote, buy-sell guidance, confidence, and margin guardrails.
dependencies.how: Guides price and margin decisions when contract capacity is insufficient.

dependencies.name: Load Offer and Booking
dependencies.description: Carrier-facing targeted offers and booking workflow.
dependencies.how: Turns matching and price decisions into carrier commitments.

dependencies.name: Drop Trailer and Dedicated Capacity
dependencies.description: Drop trailer, dedicated, and asset-light committed capacity programs.
dependencies.how: Provides durable capacity options for high-volume or constrained lanes.

rootGroups.name: Execution and Recovery
rootGroups.description: Capabilities that coordinate live shipment execution, operational recovery, communications, and proof.

capabilities.name: Execute and Recover Shipments
capabilities.description: Coordinate tenders, appointments, visibility, tracking, documents, exceptions, and customer updates through a live control tower.

flows.title: Track, triage, and recover shipments
flows.description: From live tracking through exception recovery and proof capture.

dependencies.name: Carrier Tracking and Check Calls
dependencies.description: Carrier mobile, ELD, telematics, and manual status updates.
dependencies.how: Captures live carrier status and fallback tracking.

dependencies.name: Real-Time Visibility and ETA
dependencies.description: Milestones, ETA prediction, geofences, and tracking quality.
dependencies.how: Turns tracking signals into ETA and service-risk context.

dependencies.name: Appointment and Dock Scheduling
dependencies.description: Pickup and delivery appointments, dock capacity, and rescheduling.
dependencies.how: Connects shipment status to facility windows and dock execution.

dependencies.name: Exception Management Workbench
dependencies.description: Detected, scored, and explained tender, pickup, tracking, appointment, document, and invoice exceptions.
dependencies.how: Ranks exceptions by service risk, margin impact, and recovery window.

dependencies.name: Operations Control Tower
dependencies.description: Unified operations queue and shipment context.
dependencies.how: Gives operators one workspace for prioritized recovery.

dependencies.name: Customer and Carrier Communications
dependencies.description: Threaded communication across email, SMS, portal, API, EDI, and call notes.
dependencies.how: Keeps customer and carrier updates auditable and connected to the shipment.

dependencies.name: Workflow Automation and Agents
dependencies.description: Rules, agents, and playbooks for routine operational workflows.
dependencies.how: Automates status requests, missing-document follow-up, and customer updates when safe.

dependencies.name: Document Capture and Validation
dependencies.description: Proof of delivery, bill of lading, accessorial, customs, and claim documents.
dependencies.how: Captures the proof needed for service closure and settlement.

rootGroups.name: Financial Trust and Intelligence
rootGroups.description: Capabilities that settle freight correctly, protect marketplace trust, and improve decisions with governed data.

capabilities.name: Settle, Audit, and Protect Trust
capabilities.description: Validate documents and invoices, settle carriers and shippers, manage claims, and control identity, fraud, and compliance risk.

flows.title: Audit, settle, and control risk
flows.description: From operational proof through invoice audit, settlement, claims, and risk decisions.

dependencies.name: Document Capture and Validation
dependencies.description: Proof and supporting document capture and extraction.
dependencies.how: Provides validated proof for invoice and accessorial decisions.

dependencies.name: Fuel, Accessorial and Detention Rules
dependencies.description: Fuel surcharge, detention, layover, lumper, toll, and accessorial rules.
dependencies.how: Calculates eligible charges and explains financial rules.

dependencies.name: Freight Audit and Accruals
dependencies.description: Invoice matching, accessorial validation, accruals, and cost allocation.
dependencies.how: Validates invoices against operational facts and contract terms.

dependencies.name: Settlement, Payments and Claims
dependencies.description: Carrier payment, shipper billing, claims, adjustments, and reconciliation.
dependencies.how: Issues payments, bills shippers, and tracks claims and adjustments.

dependencies.name: Identity, Fraud and Compliance Risk
dependencies.description: Identity, fraud, cargo risk, sanctions, compliance, and policy controls.
dependencies.how: Controls risky accounts, suspicious documents, payment changes, and cargo-risk patterns.

capabilities.name: Learn and Optimize the Network
capabilities.description: Use governed data, analytics, experimentation, workflow automation, and sustainability insights to improve service, cost, productivity, and emissions over time.

flows.title: Measure, test, and optimize the freight network
flows.description: From governed freight data through scorecards, experiments, automation, and sustainability decisions.

dependencies.name: Freight Data Platform
dependencies.description: Canonical freight model, event streams, warehouse, feature store, and metric layer.
dependencies.how: Provides governed entities and events for analytics and decisioning.

dependencies.name: Performance Analytics and Scorecards
dependencies.description: Shipper, carrier, lane, facility, operations, cost, emissions, and financial performance analytics.
dependencies.how: Makes service, cost, productivity, and quality visible.

dependencies.name: Experimentation and Decision Governance
dependencies.description: Controlled rollout, A/B tests, policy decisions, and model governance.
dependencies.how: Lets teams test pricing, routing, workflow, and automation decisions safely.

dependencies.name: Rate Intelligence and Benchmarking
dependencies.description: Market, lane, historical, and customer-specific rate intelligence.
dependencies.how: Improves procurement, quoting, and capacity decisions.

dependencies.name: Workflow Automation and Agents
dependencies.description: Automation policies, agents, playbooks, guardrails, and audit logs.
dependencies.how: Turns learned patterns into repeatable operational workflows.

dependencies.name: Emissions and Sustainability Insights
dependencies.description: Shipment emissions estimates, mode-shift scenarios, and sustainability reporting.
dependencies.how: Adds emissions impact to mode, carrier, and network optimization.
